title: (Pwn2Own) Canon imageCLASS MF654Cdw PJCC Request Parsing Heap-based Buffer Overflow Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows network-adjacent attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Canon imageCLASS MF654Cdw printers. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the CADM service, which listens on TCP port 9013 by default. A crafted font in a PJCC request can trigger an overflow of a heap-based buffer. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the device.
addtionnal_details: Canon has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:https://www.canon-europe.com/support/product-security/
timeline:
2025-11-11 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-03-16 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-03-16 - Advisory Updated
